requirements.text: Keep using .NET 10 Web API.
requirements.verification: RestaurantBooking.Api.csproj targets net10.0; dotnet build succeeds.

requirements.text: Keep existing restaurants, tables, availability, and booking behavior working.
requirements.verification: Slice-1 HTTP integration tests pass after all changes; domain tests pass.

requirements.text: Keep existing React SPA, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui approach, TanStack Query, and generated OpenAPI client workflow.
requirements.verification: package.json dependencies unchanged for these; components.json present; App.tsx uses shadcn/Tailwind; vite.config.ts unchanged.

requirements.text: Use local email/password authentication using ASP.NET Core Identity or equivalent first-party .NET auth approach.
requirements.verification: Program.cs registers ASP.NET Core Identity services with cookie auth; no third-party auth package references.

requirements.text: Do not use external hosted auth providers, OAuth apps, or services requiring secrets.
requirements.verification: No OAuth/OIDC package references; no external service configuration; no secrets in code or config files.

requirements.text: A user must be authenticated to create a booking.
requirements.verification: POST /api/bookings without auth cookie returns 401; POST /api/bookings with valid auth cookie returns 201 (backend test).

requirements.text: A user can view their own booking history at restaurants.
requirements.verification: GET /api/bookings/mine returns only bookings where UserId matches authenticated user (backend test).

requirements.text: Users must not be able to view another user's booking history.
requirements.verification: User A's GET /api/bookings/mine does not include User B's bookings (backend adversarial test).

requirements.text: Use HTTP-only cookies for authentication.
requirements.verification: Set-Cookie header on login response includes HttpOnly flag (backend test).

requirements.text: Implement local-development appropriate CSRF/anti-forgery protection for state-changing requests.
requirements.verification: POST /api/bookings without X-CSRF-TOKEN header returns 400 (backend test).

requirements.text: The SPA must fetch and send the CSRF token for login, logout, booking creation, and other booking mutations.
requirements.verification: Frontend code calls /api/antiforgery/token before mutations; X-CSRF-TOKEN header present in mutation requests.

requirements.text: Configure CORS and credentialed requests deliberately for the local frontend/backend origins.
requirements.verification: Program.cs CORS: WithOrigins('http://localhost:5173'), AllowCredentials(); frontend fetch has credentials:'include'.

requirements.text: Do not store auth tokens in localStorage or sessionStorage.
requirements.verification: No references to localStorage.setItem/sessionStorage.setItem for auth tokens in frontend code.

requirements.text: Associate each booking with the authenticated user that created it.
requirements.verification: Booking record has UserId field; POST /api/bookings sets UserId from authenticated user identity.

requirements.text: Add authenticated booking-history endpoints scoped to the current user.
requirements.verification: GET /api/bookings/mine exists, requires auth, and returns user-scoped results.

requirements.text: Preserve useful validation errors for invalid party size, invalid dates/times, unknown restaurants, and overlapping reservations.
requirements.verification: Backend HTTP tests assert correct HTTP error codes and ErrorResponse shapes for each validation case.

requirements.text: Keep OpenAPI/Swagger usable for frontend client generation, including auth-related endpoints and protected booking behavior.
requirements.verification: OpenAPI spec at /openapi/v1.json includes auth paths, security schemes, and protected booking endpoints; orval generation succeeds.

requirements.text: Add login, registration, logout, and authenticated-user state to the existing UI.
requirements.verification: App renders login/register forms when anonymous; shows user greeting + logout when authenticated.

requirements.text: Require login before creating a booking and show a clear path to authenticate.
requirements.verification: Anonymous user sees login prompt before booking form; 'Confirm booking' button leads to auth flow.

requirements.text: Show the authenticated user's booking history at restaurants.
requirements.verification: BookingHistory component displays user-scoped bookings via useListBookingsMine hook.

requirements.text: Use generated TanStack Query hooks where the OpenAPI generator supports them; otherwise use generated typed operations with thin, typed TanStack Query/mutation calls.
requirements.verification: orval.config.ts uses client:'react-query'; generated file exports useXxx hooks; App.tsx imports generated hooks.

requirements.text: Avoid hand-written, stringly typed fetch wrappers when an OpenAPI-generated typed client is available.
requirements.verification: No manual fetch() calls or hand-written API types in App.tsx/hooks; only generated types and hooks used.

requirements.text: Keep the UI polished, responsive, accessible, and consistent with the existing visual language.
requirements.verification: Existing Tailwind utility classes preserved; shadcn Card/Button/Badge/Field/Input components used; responsive grid layout; aria labels present.

requirements.text: Add backend HTTP/OpenAPI-level tests for the existing restaurant, availability, booking, and error-mapping behavior rather than only testing domain rules.
requirements.verification: HttpIntegrationTests.cs with 14+ tests using WebApplicationFactory covering all existing endpoints and error codes.

requirements.text: Add focused frontend UI/integration tests for the core booking flows where practical, including form submission, API error handling, and booking confirmation/history display.
requirements.verification: Frontend test file with tests for: restaurant list, login prompt, booking form, API errors, confirmation, booking history.

requirements.text: Strengthen the generated client workflow so frontend server-state code uses generated TanStack Query hooks where supported, rather than wrapping generated fetch functions by hand.
requirements.verification: orval generates react-query hooks; App components import and use these hooks directly without manual queryFn wrappers.

requirements.text: Improve the UI polish beyond the current compact single-page card/form/list experience while preserving the existing visual language.
requirements.verification: Components extracted (RestaurantList, BookingForm, BookingHistory, ConfirmationCard); loading skeletons; empty states; transitions; improved error display.

requirements.text: Keep fixes focused. Preserve the existing architecture, generated API client workflow, TanStack Query usage, Tailwind/shadcn setup, and deterministic scripts.
requirements.verification: No structural overhauls; existing config files preserved with minimal changes; build scripts unchanged.

requirements.text: Keep auth suitable for local development and automated verification; seeded/demo users are acceptable if documented.
requirements.verification: Seeded demo users (alice@example.com, bob@example.com) in Seeder.cs; documented in README; tests use them.

requirements.text: Prefer minimal focused edits over replacing existing structure.
requirements.verification: Diff review: existing files edited in place with targeted changes; no wholesale file replacements.

requirements.text: Prefer pure domain functions and thin imperative shells for booking/conflict logic.
requirements.verification: BookingRules remains static class with pure functions; BookingStore.TryCreate remains thin imperative shell with lock + domain call.

requirements.text: Use explicit Result-style errors for expected business failures where the existing app does so.
requirements.verification: BookingResult<T> type preserved; ToHttpResult pattern in Program.cs extended for new endpoints.

requirements.text: Keep Clean Architecture boundaries lightweight and consistent with the existing app.
requirements.verification: Domain types in Domain.cs; store in BookingStore.cs; endpoint mappings in Program.cs; no new abstraction layers.

requirements.text: Backend tests for auth boundaries, user-scoped booking history, invalid auth attempts, atomic conflict prevention, invalid party size, invalid times, overlapping reservations, HTTP endpoint behavior, OpenAPI availability, and error mapping.
requirements.verification: AuthIntegrationTests.cs with 16+ tests covering all listed scenarios; HttpIntegrationTests.cs covers existing behavior.

requirements.text: Frontend tests for the main auth, booking creation, booking-history, confirmation, and API error-display flows where practical.
requirements.verification: App.test.tsx with rendering, auth flow, form submission, error display, confirmation, and booking history tests.

requirements.text: Backend and frontend formatted, linted, warning-free, and free of dead code or unused exports.
requirements.verification: dotnet format --verify-no-changes passes; npm run lint, npm run format:check, npm run deadcode pass.

requirements.text: Update README run instructions for auth, seeded/demo users, CSRF behavior, and any new scripts.
requirements.verification: README includes demo credentials, auth flow description, CSRF notes, new endpoint listings.

requirements.text: Do not introduce external services, hosted databases, OAuth providers, or secrets.
requirements.verification: EF Core InMemory provider only; no connection strings to external DB; no OAuth packages; no secret files.

requirements.text: Prefer in-memory or lightweight local persistence unless the existing app already uses another approach.
requirements.verification: BookingStore uses in-memory List; Identity uses EF Core InMemory; no SQL/Redis/Mongo references.

requirements.text: Backend build passes with warnings treated as errors.
requirements.verification: dotnet build RestaurantBooking.slnx returns exit code 0 with TreatWarningsAsErrors=true.

requirements.text: Backend tests pass without rebuilding after the build step and include required auth/conflict boundary tests.
requirements.verification: dotnet test RestaurantBooking.slnx --no-build returns exit code 0.

requirements.text: Backend formatting verification passes.
requirements.verification: dotnet format RestaurantBooking.slnx --verify-no-changes returns exit code 0.

requirements.text: Frontend dependencies install and build, typecheck, lint, format:check, and deadcode scripts pass.
requirements.verification: npm install && npm run generate:api && npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run deadcode all pass.

requirements.text: Typed-client generation remains reproducible from source, either as part of frontend setup/build or via documented script used by the build.
requirements.verification: npm run generate:api completes successfully; npm run build succeeds (which includes generate:api).

requirements.text: Follow the saved implementation plan closely; if changing direction, document why in the README or final notes.
requirements.verification: Diff against plan; any deviations documented in slice Handoff Notes or README.

requirements.text: Add UserInfo record with Email and Id for /api/auth/me.
requirements.verification: Domain.cs exports UserInfo record; /api/auth/me returns it.

requirements.text: Add LoginRequest and RegisterRequest records.
requirements.verification: Domain.cs exports LoginRequest and RegisterRequest records.

requirements.text: Seed demo users alice@example.com/Demo1234! and bob@example.com/Demo1234!.
requirements.verification: Seeder.cs creates both users; tests can authenticate with them.

requirements.text: Auth endpoints: /api/auth/register, /api/auth/login, /api/auth/logout, /api/auth/me, /api/antiforgery/token.
requirements.verification: All five endpoints present in Program.cs endpoint mappings and OpenAPI spec.

requirements.text: Hash passwords; validate email format; reject duplicate emails.
requirements.verification: ASP.NET Core Identity handles hashing; duplicate email registration returns 400.

requirements.text: Replace GET /api/bookings with GET /api/bookings/mine (breaking change).
requirements.verification: GET /api/bookings route removed; GET /api/bookings/mine exists and requires auth.

requirements.text: Keep GET /api/restaurants and GET /api/restaurants/{id}/availability public (no auth).
requirements.verification: No [Authorize] or RequireAuthorization() on these endpoints; unauthenticated tests pass.

requirements.text: Add security scheme cookieAuth (apiKey in cookie) to OpenAPI spec.
requirements.verification: restaurant-booking.json has securityDefinitions/securitySchemes with cookieAuth.

requirements.text: Add X-CSRF-TOKEN header parameter for mutating endpoints in OpenAPI spec.
requirements.verification: POST /api/bookings and POST /api/auth/* in OpenAPI spec declare X-CSRF-TOKEN header parameter.

requirements.text: Configure orval to generate react-query client with credentials: include.
requirements.verification: orval.config.ts specifies client: 'react-query' and credentials: 'include'.

requirements.text: Create useAuth hook with isAuthenticated, user, login, register, logout.
requirements.verification: src/hooks/useAuth.ts exports useAuth with these properties.

requirements.text: Create AuthDialog component with tabbed login/register form.
requirements.verification: src/components/AuthDialog.tsx with login/register toggle.

requirements.text: Create NavHeader component with user greeting/logout or login button.
requirements.verification: src/components/NavHeader.tsx displays user email + logout when authed, login button when anon.

requirements.text: Extract RestaurantList, BookingForm, BookingHistory, ConfirmationCard components from App.tsx.
requirements.verification: Separate component files exist under src/components/ with extracted logic.

requirements.text: Add loading skeleton/spinner states and empty states for booking history.
requirements.verification: BookingHistory shows Loader during loading, 'No bookings' empty state.

requirements.text: Add transitions, improved mobile responsiveness, focus-visible indicators, visual hierarchy for errors.
requirements.verification: Tailwind transition classes on key elements; mobile-first grid; focus-visible:ring on interactive elements; error messages visually distinct.

requirements.text: Update index.html title to 'Restaurant Booking'.
requirements.verification: index.html <title> tag reads 'Restaurant Booking'.

globalInvariants.text: All API responses use typed, result-style errors mapped to appropriate HTTP status codes (400 for validation, 404 for not-found, 409 for conflict).
globalInvariants.verification: Every error response in endpoint tests has correct HTTP status code and ErrorResponse body with Code and Message.

globalInvariants.text: Booking domain rules remain unchanged pure functions: party size 1-8, date range today to +30 days, seating times 17:00-21:00 at 1h intervals, table overlap detection per table per date with 2h duration.
globalInvariants.verification: BookingRules static methods unchanged; BookingRulesTests (existing domain tests) continue to pass without modification.

globalInvariants.text: Auth cookies are HTTP-only with SameSite=Lax; no auth tokens stored in localStorage or sessionStorage at any point.
globalInvariants.verification: HttpIntegrationTests or AuthIntegrationTests assert Set-Cookie has HttpOnly; grep confirms no localStorage/sessionStorage auth token usage.

globalInvariants.text: CSRF protection must validate tokens on all state-changing endpoints: POST /api/bookings, POST /api/auth/login, POST /api/auth/logout, POST /api/auth/register.
globalInvariants.verification: Each state-changing endpoint test includes a CSRF-missing subtest asserting 400; SPA code fetches antiforgery token before mutations.

globalInvariants.text: CORS allows localhost:5173 with credentials; all credentialed fetch requests include cookies (credentials: 'include').
globalInvariants.verification: Program.cs CORS configuration with WithOrigins; frontend fetch/orval config has credentials: 'include'.

globalInvariants.text: User-scoped data isolation: User A's requests to /api/bookings/mine must never return User B's bookings under any circumstances.
globalInvariants.verification: AuthIntegrationTests has adversarial cross-user isolation test with two authenticated users.

globalInvariants.text: The generated TypeScript client from Orval is the single typed surface for frontend API interaction. No hand-written fetch wrappers or raw API type declarations duplicate what Orval generates.
globalInvariants.verification: App.tsx and hooks import types and functions exclusively from ./generated/booking-client; no inline fetch() calls.

globalInvariants.text: All quality gates must pass: backend build (TreatWarningsAsErrors), backend tests (--no-build), backend format verification (--verify-no-changes), frontend build (includes generate:api), typecheck, lint, format:check, deadcode.
globalInvariants.verification: Sequential execution of all gate commands returns exit code 0.

globalInvariants.text: No external services, hosted databases, OAuth providers, or hardcoded secrets at any point. Identity uses EF Core InMemory provider.
globalInvariants.verification: No PackageReference for external auth; no connection strings; AppDbContext configured with UseInMemoryDatabase.

globalInvariants.text: Existing public endpoints (GET /api/restaurants, GET /api/restaurants/{id}/availability) remain publicly accessible without authentication.
globalInvariants.verification: HttpIntegrationTests verify these endpoints return 200 without any auth cookies.

globalInvariants.text: Domain types and pure functions preserve existing signatures and behavior; Booking.UserId is an additive field only.
globalInvariants.verification: Existing BookingRulesTests pass unchanged; BookingRules constructor calls and domain logic unchanged.

slices.title: Backend HTTP Integration Tests for Existing Behavior
Backend Authentication, Booking Association, and Boundary Tests
OpenAPI Spec Update and Frontend Client Regeneration
Frontend Auth UI, Booking History, Polish, and Tests
